description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker image with a docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375/, and includes a before_script that runs docker info and logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define a single stage named build_image and a job called build_image that runs docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/herber523/scylladb-k8s ./scylla then docker push registry.gitlab.com/herber523/scylladb-k8s, using the build_image stage. The job has no additional caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
